Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Existence Must have Receive Application and Gather Additional Documents So these must occur Absence Prohibits Proceed Without Compliance Exactly One There is exactly one occurrence of Preliminary Credit Check Init Start at Receive Application Response Receiving application triggers Preliminary Credit Check Precedence Quality Assurance Review precedes Authorize Contract Terms Succession Preliminary Credit Check is succeeded by Gather Additional Documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The model uses constraints like existence absence exactly one init responded existence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Starting event Receive Application init Constraint response from receiving application triggers Preliminary Credit Check So step 2 Preliminary Credit Check Constraint succession says that after Preliminary Credit Check Gather Additional Documents must occur So step 3 Gather Additional Documents

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The process would look like After preliminary credit check gather additional documents Then run a Quality Assurance Review on the gathered documentation After that Authorize Contract Terms

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After gathering documents they undergo a Quality Assurance Review This QA review verifies compliance with internal standards and regulatory requirements Precedence constraint ensures the QA review occurs before any final contract terms are authorized

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The validated process then triggers the assembly of a loan offer package The chain succession rule indicates that after QA review assembling the loan offer package is required

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: With the final loan package ready funds are transferred to the customers account as per the chainresponse constraint Assemble Loan Offer Package triggers Transfer Funds Additionally Notify Customer is triggered by the altresponse chain or altprecedence constraints

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Finally the process prohibits any activity like Proceed Without Compliance ensuring mandatory steps are not skipped

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Real world motivations Regulatory compliance and risk management Ensures that credit check document verification quality assurance review and final authorization are all done before disbursement Fraud prevention The sequential ordering minimizes fraud by verifying applicant details thoroughly Operational best practices Standardization of process through clear constraints ensures efficiency and consistency across loan applications Customer satisfaction Timely notifications and clear steps provide transparency to customers

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: If Preliminary Credit Check is skipped potential risk exposure increases regulatory bodies might penalize the institution Skipping Quality Assurance Review could lead to unauthorized or inaccurate contract terms being approved which may result in financial loss or legal liability Transferring funds prematurely might lead to customer confusion and operational errors Bypassing compliance steps is forbidden and would likely trigger internal audits or regulatory sanctions
